etymology.description: 衤 ('clothes') + 刀 ('knife') = starting by cutting fabric -> initial, beginning
etymology.interpretation: When beginning to make clothing, one starts by cutting the cloth. This initial action represents the concept of 'beginning' or 'initial'. The character visually conveys the combination of these two elements: a piece of fabric and the act of cutting, which together symbolize the starting point of creating clothing.

examples.chinese: 在学习的初期(在學習的初期)，我花了很多时间(我花了很多時間)阅读课本(閱讀課本)。
examples.pinyin: Zài xuéxí de chūqī, wǒ huā le hěn duō shíjiān yuèdú kèběn.
examples.english: In the initial stages of studying, I spent a lot of time reading textbooks.

examples.chinese: 初夏时节(初夏時節)，花儿们纷纷绽放(花兒們紛紛綻放)。
examples.english: In early summer, the flowers bloom abundantly.

examples.chinese: 我们在旅程的开端(我們在旅程的開端)充满期待(充滿期待)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen zài lǚchéng de kāiduān chōngmǎn qídài.
examples.english: At the beginning of the journey, we are filled with anticipation.
